summary: Monthly/yearly subscriber National TV Game archive - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a user is a Monthly/Yearly subscriber
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

*NOTE:* National TV game = Fox Saturday Baseball, Roku Sunday Morning Baseball
*NOTE:* Game Tile designs for reference - [https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99767&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99767&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|smart-link]

steps.action: WHEN a user views/focuses an archive National TV game tile
steps.result:
THEN a "LOCKED" badge does not display in the upper left corner of the game tile
AND "FINAL" displays in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the game match up with respective score is displayed
AND the Pitching Results are displayed
AND the Broadcast Networks are displayed
